고린도전서 6:1.content: Dare any of you, having a matter against his neighbor, go to law before the unrighteous, and not before the saints?

고린도전서 6:2.content: Don’t you know that the saints will judge the world? And if the world is judged by you, are you unworthy to judge the smallest matters?

고린도전서 6:3.content: Don’t you know that we will judge angels? How much more, things that pertain to this life?

고린도전서 6:4.content: If then you have to judge things pertaining to this life, do you set them to judge who are of no account in the assembly?

고린도전서 6:5.content: I say this to move you to shame. Isn’t there even one wise man among you who would be able to decide between his brothers?

고린도전서 6:6.content: But brother goes to law with brother, and that before unbelievers!

고린도전서 6:7.content: Therefore it is already altogether a defect in you, that you have lawsuits one with another. Why not rather be wronged? Why not rather be defrauded?

고린도전서 6:8.content: No, but you yourselves do wrong and defraud, and that against your brothers.

고린도전서 6:9.content: Or don’t you know that the unrighteous will not inherit God’s Kingdom? Don’t be deceived. Neither the sexually immoral, nor idolaters, nor adulterers, nor male prostitutes, nor homosexuals,

고린도전서 6:10.content: nor thieves, nor covetous, nor drunkards, nor slanderers, nor extortionists, will inherit God’s Kingdom.

고린도전서 6:11.content: Some of you were such, but you were washed. But you were sanctified. But you were justified in the name of the Lord Jesus, and in the Spirit of our God.

고린도전서 6:12.content: “All things are lawful for me,” but not all things are expedient. “All things are lawful for me,” but I will not be brought under the power of anything.

고린도전서 6:13.content: “Foods for the belly, and the belly for foods,” but God will bring to nothing both it and them. But the body is not for sexual immorality, but for the Lord; and the Lord for the body.

고린도전서 6:14.content: Now God raised up the Lord, and will also raise us up by his power.

고린도전서 6:15.content: Don’t you know that your bodies are members of Christ? Shall I then take the members of Christ and make them members of a prostitute? May it never be!

고린도전서 6:16.content: Or don’t you know that he who is joined to a prostitute is one body? For, “The two”, he says, “will become one flesh.”

고린도전서 6:17.content: But he who is joined to the Lord is one spirit.

고린도전서 6:18.content: Flee sexual immorality! “Every sin that a man does is outside the body,” but he who commits sexual immorality sins against his own body.

고린도전서 6:19.content: Or don’t you know that your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit who is in you, whom you have from God? You are not your own,

고린도전서 6:20.content: for you were bought with a price. Therefore glorify God in your body and in your spirit, which are God’s.
